title: Anode material, and electrochemical device and electronic device comprising the same
abstract: An anode material, and an electrochemical device and an electronic device comprising the same are disclosed. The anode material is a silicon-based anode material having a core-shell structure, where a core is silicon oxide, and the silicon oxide can be represented by the general formula SiO x (about 0< x < about 2); and where the shell disposed on at least a portion of an outer surface of the silicon oxide core comprises a silicate of element M, and M is selected from the group consisting of Mg, Ca, Sr, Ba, Al, Ti, Zn and a combination thereof. The lithium-ion battery prepared from the anode material has high first coulombic efficiency and excellent cycle performance.
claims: Claims ( 20 ) An횂혻anode횂혻material,횂혻comprising: a횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻core,횂혻the횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻being횂혻represented횂혻by횂혻the횂혻general횂혻formula횂혻SiO x 횂혻(about횂혻0<횂혻x횂혻<횂혻about횂혻2)횂혻;횂혻and a횂혻shell,횂혻disposed횂혻on횂혻at횂혻least횂혻a횂혻portion횂혻of횂혻an횂혻outer횂혻surface횂혻of횂혻the횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻core, wherein횂혻the횂혻shell횂혻comprises횂혻a횂혻silicate횂혻of횂혻M,횂혻and wherein횂혻M횂혻is횂혻selected횂혻from횂혻the횂혻group횂혻consisting횂혻of횂혻Mg,횂혻Ca,횂혻Sr,횂혻Ba,횂혻Al,횂혻Ti,횂혻Zn횂혻and횂혻a횂혻combination횂혻thereof. The횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻according횂혻to횂혻claim횂혻1,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻molar횂혻ratio횂혻of횂혻the횂혻M횂혻to횂혻the횂혻Si횂혻in횂혻the횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻is횂혻about횂혻0.1횂혻to횂혻about횂혻0.6. The횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻according횂혻to횂혻claim횂혻1,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻thickness횂혻L횂혻of횂혻the횂혻shell횂혻is횂혻about횂혻L창혟짚3.0횂혻횓쩌m. The횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻according횂혻to횂혻claim횂혻1,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻content횂혻of횂혻M횂혻is횂혻gradually횂혻decreased횂혻from횂혻the횂혻outside횂혻of횂혻the횂혻shell횂혻to횂혻the횂혻inside횂혻of횂혻the횂혻shell. The횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻according횂혻to횂혻claim횂혻1,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻comprises횂혻silicon횂혻grains,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻size횂혻D횂혻of횂혻the횂혻silicon횂혻grains횂혻is횂혻about횂혻2횂혻nm횂혻창혟짚횂혻D횂혻창혟짚횂혻about횂혻40횂혻nm,횂혻and횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻size횂혻D횂혻is횂혻determined횂혻by횂혻the횂혻Scherrer횂혻equation횂혻based횂혻on횂혻the횂혻half-peak횂혻width횂혻of횂혻the횂혻diffraction횂혻peak횂혻of횂혻Si횂혻(111)횂혻in횂혻an횂혻X-ray횂혻diffraction횂혻analysis. A횂혻method횂혻for횂혻preparing횂혻an횂혻anode횂혻material횂혻comprising횂혻a횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻core횂혻and횂혻a횂혻shell횂혻disposed횂혻on횂혻at횂혻least횂혻a횂혻portion횂혻of횂혻an횂혻outer횂혻surface횂혻of횂혻the횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻core,횂혻wherein횂혻the횂혻silicon횂혻oxide횂혻is횂혻represented횂혻by횂혻the횂혻general횂혻formula횂혻SiO x 횂혻(0<x<2)횂혻,횂혻and횂혻the횂혻shell횂혻comprises횂혻a횂혻silicate횂혻of횂혻M,횂혻and횂혻M횂혻is횂혻selected횂혻from횂혻the횂혻group횂혻consisting횂혻of횂혻Mg,횂혻Ca,횂혻Sr,횂혻Ba,횂혻Al,횂혻Ti,횂혻Zn횂혻and횂혻a횂혻combination횂혻thereof, the횂혻method횂혻comprising: mixing횂혻an횂혻M횂혻source횂혻and횂혻a횂혻silicon횂혻oxide; carrying횂혻out횂혻a횂혻high-temperature횂혻treatment횂혻on횂혻the횂혻mixed횂혻material횂혻in횂혻an횂혻inert횂혻gas횂혻atmosphere횂혻at횂혻about횂혻1000창혙혘횂혻to횂혻about횂혻1400창혙혘;횂혻and grinding횂혻the횂혻material횂혻subjected횂혻to횂혻the횂혻high-temperature횂혻treatment.
